response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly accomplished Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience, making him severely overqualified for a Junior/Mid-Level role. While his TypeScript, Node.js, React, AI-agent, and Kubernetes skills align technically, the seniority mismatch creates untenable expectations on both sides — compensation, autonomy, and career trajectory would all be misaligned. Additionally, the candidate is based in São Paulo, Brazil, while the role demands high on-site presence, representing a near-insurmountable logistical barrier. PostgreSQL is not evidenced in his profile; his relational DB exposure appears limited to MySQL and SQL generics, with MongoDB dominating his stack.
strengths: Strong TypeScript proficiency demonstrated across multiple production environments (Optilyz, re:cinq)
Covers the full stack including React, Node.js, REST APIs, and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Hands-on LLM and AI-agent integration experience at re:cinq, matching a key nice-to-have
concerns: Grossly overqualified: Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years applying for an entry-level IC role
Located in São Paulo, Brazil — incompatible with the high on-site presence requirement
No evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; relational DB work is thin relative to heavy MongoDB usage
